column1: Hey Ryan, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Do you have a list of the different options?
Yea Punta Cana and Cancun been the most popular. Theres also Bahamas and Cabo
Ok ya I was looking into Cancun
Bet that. How many ppl in your group?
Word that's solid fs. You all from the same school?
Yep we all are from Oswego
We'll go there no from there
Oh dope we have a couple groups from your school
Yall energy is 10/10 for sure lol
And ya we were looking into Cancun
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Let's run it. I'll slide a discount in there for you and the payment plan to break the payments into two
That way yall don't get stuck paying it all at once
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Word what's the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Came through just texting my boys
Are those prices based on 10 people going?
yea the total amount doesnt really change things. its all based on per person, per room
with 2 we'll do a room of 4, and two rooms of 3
with 10* room of 4 and two of 3
Ok I will let you know
Also is the trips only from the 14th?
Is there any that leave on Sunday or Monday
Nah bro 14th is just when most ppl travel your week
We can start any date that week
So we can get like a 5 day trip that starts on the 16th?
pricing will be the same based on the 4 night or 5 night depending on length
Ryan brotha whats good, how we feelin about the options so far?
How's it going gonna need a few more days
And also if we did the room of 3
yea like monday? I'll see if I can set something aside for that day
yea rooms have two double beds. those are in between a queen size and full size
Could u do Tuesday or wensday
Getting my wisdoms teeth out Monday so I don't think I'll be in the right mindset
Also do u offer any plans with flight included
Lol bro boutta be out of it after that procedure
thats fine tho, should be aight. We can do flights but its a lot cheaper for you to get them separately on your own
which airport we gonna fly out of? ill take a look
Ryan brotha good luck with getting the wisdom teeth out today
Just got them out hurts like hell
yea it must! take it easy today lets sync up tomorrow and get things lined up for the group
yerr whats good bro, how you feelin?
Any word on the rest of the group? is everyone ready to get settled
I think just waiting on 2 responses
Aight bet keep me posted so I can set things up for you. was it 10 ppl still?
Ryan brotha whats the word, you hear back from those other two yet?
Ya I think we gonna have 10
Aight bet bet, everyone ready to roll?
We're ready just need to get a plan for how much and I can send it to the guys
I'll make the reservation link now and send it over so you can send it out
Was it Cancun we decided on? Or Punta Cana
Could u do first night be the 17th?
16th is a Monday I've been messsing myself up
Yea 16th is Monday. So Monday to Saturday
Gonna send this in an email too with details on how to navigate through if anyone needs help!
Ok so would everyone have to pay 200 up front?
Where do we all pay 200 too?
Select Join This Trip. then select Join Trip on an open TBA slot
fill in your details, it'll prompt you through creating an account. and then you'll see a big button to make your deposit payment of $200
sent this in an email too so you have it
Ok does everyone need to make an account?
yea each person is responsible for their own payments
checkin in did y'all need any help getting onto the portal?
Yes we all working on it right now
Do you guys offer plans with flights too?
we do but you save a lot of money getting flights separately on your own. if you lmk which airport you wanna fly out of ill send you a good one to buy
yoo my fault brotha got called into a bunch of meetings, checkin rn for you
one out of Rochester about the same, $588 a little cheaper and return flight is def better https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/pqVsenESM3BheRNk7
I accidentally put my bday wrong when making my account
All good I'll update it as soon as I can. You're good to keep going
Ok and for those flights u sent what time do we need to be at punta for our bus
What's the correct dates for bday?
And once you get the flight, you enter those details into you account and our team orchestrates your ride from the airport to the resort
Ok do all 10 of us need to be on the same flight?
Also do you have an app?
Or could I add you too a gc with all of us😭😭
A lot of them need to know the details and I'm struggling trying to relay them all
Lol damn, lowkey I can't do a group chat on the sms line I have for work
You don't all need the same flight
The reservation app works well on mobile, it's kind of app like. Ppl just follow the link and hit join this trip. It's pretty light
Did some of them have a specific question?
yoyo where we at with things
aight word lmk if anyone needs help
Are you able to see everyone that joins
yup. you, Louis, Andrew and Ryan H
just a heads up tho, each spot isnt confirmed / reserved until the deposit is made
Ok we still have a little time right
Tbh your deposit was due days ago bro. I've been fighting to keep this open for you
If we get it all in by tmrw is it good everyone will know by then
I've been on there asses non stop
I appreciate u keep helping us
yea let me put the request in rn
What does it mean when it says temporary reserved
typically it does that when someone clicks a slot and then backs out. or if theyre in the process of creating their account
if the backed out, itll clear the temp reserve in about 3 minutes
Do u see Evan and Jon?
If we pay the 200 are we able to get that back for canceling in case someone get sick or something
And do you need a passport?
Or would a real id work
yea just add the travel protection insurance policy during the payment. it covers up to 75% of your payments and is a Cancel for Any Reason policy by Travel Insured
you do need a passport, you dont need to enter it in right now, you can skip it. but you will need it to travel
We also may be down to 8 people so we may lessen our rooms
To just rooms of 4 and 4 if that's fine
The two people we are waiting on we just kicked out
Ok we will have everything paid by tmrw
We are either gonna have 9 or 8 waiting on 2 people
yea just lmk if its 8 or 9 when you know
Everyone is serious too we will have this done by tmrw
I'll let you know in the morning if it's 8 or 9
yea every room gets water bottles
when the cleaning ladies come by throw them a couple dollars and they'll make sure they hook it up with more every time
Is the other resort still an option for us?
we can switch, pricing is a little more. just lmk
Ok we are gonna go with oasis
Is the food and room service good
Lots of bad reviews but figure I'll ask u
In my opinion, food is mid
What about at the other one is it the same?
But, its spring break, youre more there for the vibe and having a good time. the other resort, food is a little better for sure. but the vibe aint the same
Ok ya so u would say more college kids go oasis
Yea like a thousand percent. its lit 24/7 lol
If you want more of a chill vibe, the other resort could work for you
Nah we want a party vibe fs lol
People main concerns was just food
We don't wanna get sick... lol
I feel you. theres bottles you'll just want to say on top of the cleaning ladies that come by and make sure you grab a few when they come by
Ok word and if we have 8 and did 2 rooms
Nah theyre double beds, so in between a full size and queen size
So we have 7 total locked in for oasis
Could we do 1 room of 4 and one room of 3
Ok do we use the same link?
Where on the link do u schedule the pickup at airport
You just add your flight info into your account once you have it. We take care of the rest
Does it matter what time we get there on Monday?
If we get there around 11am is that fine
Ok so we booked our flights
How can I put it in so we can get the shuttle thingy
Word. log into your account you'll see a tab that says flights. enter in all the info
Is there different types of wrist bands u can get to help like skip the lines at bars and stuff?
Yessir that's the party pass. For like the events off of the resort?
What events does it get you?
D'Cave, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, Rakata
So what wrist band do we have rn
Yall got the base package rn, comes with all of the parties and events that happen on the resort
Anything off the resort is a separate add on
Ok and if we got the party pass hm would it be
3 event pass is $200. There's also a 4 and 5
Comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar
So we would be able to go 3 diffent ones for 200
Do you think it's worth it or is there a lot of stuff to do on the resorts
I mean personally I say it's worth doing. Adds to the experience. You have until 2 days before the trip to add this in tho so you got time
Ok is that the only pass u offer
Like do the lines on the resort get long for food and drinks
not really, theres a ton of bars on resort to grab a drink. we dont really have wristbands for things like that on the resort
theres a premium wristband you can get that gives you some of the specialty restaurants
that you can do at check in
I wanna say its $50 per night. thats all situated at the resort at the concierge desk
How do I schedule the bus?
And we're going to the oasis right
Yea Grand Oasis. just add your flight info to your account. our ops team will schedule your pickup and dropoff
Can any of us do it
yea everyone has to do it for their individual accounts
hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group
Yeah gonna shoot a text tn
Could u send the link again
That I could use to log in and schedule my pickup from airport
Ok so I logged in where do I go from there?
theres a tab that says flight info
click on that and itll open up a window to add all of the details
Hey man, with everything going on I was just wondering what are different options are if we have to possibly refund.
It's not cause we can't go but with the government coming out with not wanting people to travel to Mexico due to risk. We are not sure what to do.

Sup brother, totally understand the concern. As of right now there is no U.S. travel ban in place, Cancun is under a Level 2 advisory and all airlines and hotels are operating normally. We have travelers there now as well as our on site staff and everything is running as scheduled

For options, if you have CFAR travel protection with Travel Insured, we can cancel your reservation and you'll submit a claim through the insurance provider for refund. If not, an alternative we're offering is a package to Punta Cana at revised $400 package rate per person
I'm not sure which confirmation code you're referring to my brotha
Did u see we all did it?
Hi so one of our guys doesent want to go and I was wondering if I could transfer his ticket to one of my other buddies
He would be able to get a flight to match with us as long as he could transfer his ticket over
whats up Ryan, unfort its too late to do any switching. all reservations are confirmed as is
Is it too late to buy the party pass or food options
we can add the party pass in, will just need to pay the balance asap. which one did we want to add in
and which food options you referring to? the resort is all you can eat. there are specialty restaurants that you make a reservation for, those are done after you check in at the concierge desk
also is Louis on the same flight as anyone in the group?
Yeah he's on the same as all of us
And could u just explain the party pass again
And what different spots we could go with it
And what it offers sorry I just wanna explain to my friends

yea np. party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more Cancun 3-Night Party Package: $210 per person 4-Night Party Package: $269 per person 5-Night Party Package: $299 per person
Sorry to keep brothering you but is there a bus readg for us now that we all put in our flights?
Yup yup. As long as the flight info is uploaded you're all good to go
Could u check and make sure its all good
Louis didn't submit his since he's not going is that fine
yea everyones flight info is in
yoyo, I saw Spencer added the 3 night package to his account, did you all wanna do it?
I can add it rn if everyone wants in. they just gotta pay off their balance asap after its done
We would just go through the website to pay for it?
What's up we are gonna buy it any chance we can buy it tmrw?
And can u get the pass through a different website or is it only thought this
its the reservation portal, gets added to your reservation. just lmk when ready
So a few of us are gonna do it tmrw that's fine?
The rest are gonna try to tn
aight bet just lmk if they need any help adding it on
yoo need Ryan to secure that pass asap
Ok me and Drew doing it right now
Can Ryan heraty do it at 4 that's when he gets home from work he will be the last one
bet, and he should be good but if its gona before then lmk
Ok I went on but there's no link to select the pass
I'll add it in for you. did everyone want to add it in?
word just added that in, each of you just gotta log in and pay it off
I think u added it to Jon's even tho he already bought it
yoyo we need Louis to pay his balance off asap this am
Okay we are texting him rn
What does he have to pay?
If it's the party pass just take it off his
Yea it's the party pass. He's not gonna do it?
Yeah he's gonna back out so just us 6
word so he's not going anymore at all?
Yeah free money for u guys lol
If only it worked that way lol. Everything is paid for
But all good I'll let the ops team know
Our flights a little delayed and we are getting into Cancun now
yooo. yea bro no worries teams on top of it all, we track your flight #
if you have / had any issues just lmk
Yep it was all good. Thanks
